title: Animações em menus, filtros e painéis — Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan to add subtle CSS-only open/close animations to menus, filter dropdowns, panels, and modals in Grimório.
notes: Task-by-task implementation plan with checkboxes, file structure table, and global constraints — no user stories/acceptance criteria (not PRD), no ADR Decision/Consequences status, no API/schema contracts (not SPEC). Classified as DOC (plan/context artifact).
